ItacPersonItem.Notes: On the activity of this printer, see Lewis, Mary S., Antonio Gardano, Venetian Music Printer, 1538–1569: A Descriptive Bibliography and Historical Study. Vol. 1, 1538–-1549 (New York: Garland, 1988).
ItacPersonItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
